zones.description: Kernel authority, receipts, formal proofs, and policy-bearing runtime paths are immutable to self-modification apply decisions.
Governance and self-modification policies may be proposed, but not directly applied by self-modification.
Control-plane coordination code may produce proposals and validation evidence, but apply requires the governed pipeline and operator path.
Shell presentation and collection surfaces may be applied only after the self-modification gate stack passes.
Gateway boundary integrations may be applied only after the self-modification gate stack passes.
